enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Payments Banks -
Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Payments Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into effect from the date of issue.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').

guidelines, the bank shall bring the same to the notice of the RBI.
